---
title: "AD698 - Applied Generative AI"
subtitle: "M03 Lab2"
categories: ['M03:', 'Lab']
description: "Hands-on lab for Module 3 focused on M03 Lab2."
---

# M03 Lab02

## Lab Notebook Pattern

When you build this lab out, use a lightweight structure:

1. Setup
2. Core task blocks
3. Validation output after each block
4. Short interpretation

## Lab Validation Standard

Students should show intermediate evidence, not only final outputs. Typical checks include chunk counts, embedding shapes, retrieval examples, or short sanity-check tables.

If this lab requires a written memo, reflection, or report in addition to the notebook, format that written deliverable in **APA 7**.
